title: cadetia citrina
intro: Cadetia citrina, also known as the blue cadetia or blue glory flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cadetia citrina include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
